name: mobile-workflow
description: End-to-end mobile development workflow for iOS and Android. Skills: mobile-ui-builder (generate + validate storyboards/layouts, landscape safety, scroll view constraints), code-convention, code-review. Commands: pre-implementation (Jira grooming), implement (spec, TDD, refactor, standards/adversarial checks), testing (test, coverage, fixture, debug, analyze), post-implementation (design-doc, PR).
